bead.title: EPIC: ADR-022 worker client-server (rev 5) implementation
bead.description: Implementation of ADR-022 rev 5 (commit 484b9a08): autonomous-default workers with optional best-effort server reporting. The 9 implementation beads + 1 coordination bead are children of this epic. Spec: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-022-worker-client-server-architecture.md sections Implementation roadmap.
bead.acceptance: All 9 implementation children closed (steps 1-9 from the roadmap). Coordination bead 10 closed (C7 conflict resolved). FEAT-006 reflects rev 5. Acceptance bead's soak passed for ≥1 week. CHANGELOG entry merged.
